payload.title: Authority inversion risk: test-output-admission-authority
payload.summary: Some verification still happens as direct command output rather than explicit test intent/result records.
evidence: visible_artifact=Vitest/pnpm output and ad hoc test transcripts
hidden_authority=Test output is admission evidence only when requested through TIZ or recorded as bounded verification evidence.
current_guard=Testing Intent Zone doctrine, verification records, task report verification JSON.
payload.proposed_action: Prefer TIZ-backed verification and surface non-TIZ test transcript use as advisory until full cutover.

promotion.note: Envelope archived; no target-zone mutation was performed.
